# Perfy

> Perfy (https://perfy.io) is a community fragrance database. It provides honest,
> community-driven ratings for perfumes and colognes: longevity (how long a
> fragrance lasts), sillage (how far it projects), gender lean, and price/value.
> Ratings are seeded from AI analysis of real Reddit discussions (r/fragrance,
> r/MaleFragranceAdvice and related communities) and refined by anonymous
> community votes on the site. Perfy also identifies "dupes" — cheaper
> fragrances with similar accord profiles to expensive ones.

Perfy covers 4,000+ fragrances and 450+ brands, UK-focused pricing.

## Key pages

- Fragrance pages: https://perfy.io/fragrance/{slug} — scent profile (top/middle/base
  notes, accords, fragrance family), community ratings with vote distributions,
  Reddit review scores, season/occasion classification, and UK buying options.
- Trending: https://perfy.io/trending — fragrances ranked by Reddit discussion volume.
- Dupe finder: https://perfy.io/dupes — find similar-smelling cheaper alternatives,
  matched by accord profile.
- Browse by note: https://perfy.io/notes — every fragrance featuring a given
  ingredient (bergamot, oud, vanilla, etc.).
- Brands: https://perfy.io/brands
- Monthly community awards: https://perfy.io/awards

## Data & methodology

- Reddit sentiment scores are derived from public posts, AI-analysed, updated weekly.
- Community votes are anonymous; one vote per attribute per session.
- Seeded baselines are always labelled "Seeded from community data" until real
  votes take over.
- Note pyramids use source tier data where available; otherwise tiers are
  estimated from ingredient volatility and labelled as estimates.
- Some retailer links are affiliate links (disclosed at
  https://perfy.io/affiliate-disclosure); commissions never influence scores.

## Contact
